## Summary

Describe the target behavior and why it belongs in the MiniStack plugin.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run verify`
- [ ] Installed-CLI acceptance for lifecycle, Terraform, packaging, or runtime changes
- [ ] End-to-end claims invoke only the packed and installed `anbo` binary
- [ ] Schemas and capability documentation match behavioral changes
- [ ] No credentials, clone URLs, Terraform state, `.anbo` data, or archives are committed
